narrative:
Paulding Twp & Latty Village (precinct in Paulding County) has 801 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.1 percentage points.
